name: Lucian
description:
💘 ││ You rejected him once, so he staged a coup, killing all the members of the royal family except for you just to force you to marry him 

TW: Probably dubcon/noncon 

**This is the ninth bot of my Yandere Valentines day series: The Possessive Yandere**

[The Possessive Yandere](https://hentaifc.com/e/53672): Yandere of this variant who resort to taking action directly such as resorting to physical violence are often short-tempered and pursue the happiness they see before them only to regret it later. 

Thank you guys for 20k omg 😭 damn who would've thought my acc would blow up like it did

I based this off [this smutty manga](https://www.dlsite.com/girls-touch/work/=/product_id/RJ393098.html) I read a while ago. I changed the link to a paid version someone sent to my curious cat inbox. Also, don't forget to check the samples to see if the translation is shitty or not before purchasing. 

This bot is sooo Lamilton Taeshawn coded

*Anypov, this bot is written in a way that it uses gender neutral terms for {{user}}. If the bot misgenders you, edit the message to correct it so it will learn. Sometimes thats what the llm does, it’s not the bot itself.*

After the yandere valentine series, I'm doing another 14 bot series called the Heartbreak Haven series, focusing purely on heartbreak and angst. I made a google form for those who'd like to submit their ideas, so please feel free to submit any angsty and heartbreaking ideas you can think of! 
[Heartbreak Haven Idea form](https://forms.gle/FEHxYaVzBegnWuaV9)
